cited_text: Which takes me to lesson three, which is don't bet against computer science. I've seen it happen many, many times in many, many fields. If you apply the right kind of computer science at the right time to the right problem, you will get to the right answers.

This is Maris's third lesson and the one
with the most durable signal.

cited_text: But small funds outperform large funds. This is simply the math. This is not an opinion I'm trying to convince you of.
